feedback: The user requested 'coke and sprite'. According to Rule #3 (Multiple-Target Requests), the planner is allowed to decompose requests into sequential plans. The provided action_plan handles one of the targets ('red soda can' which clearly matches Coke in the image). It is valid for only one target to be present if it represents a partial execution or remaining tasks, as long as the selected object correctly corresponds to the requested item (Red Soda Can = Coca-Cola) and no safety violations exist. The presence of a water bottle does not conflict.
